meaning: vi.昏晕,惊讶,酣睡n.狂喜,陶醉
examples: Such Numbers should make strategists swoon.
Critics worldwide swoon over my original line of corduroy evening wear.
These roadside food trucks dot the province serving up classic poutines that make purists swoon.
All three pay a yield of about 3%, reflecting in part the recent stock market swoon.
